fields.name: ReviewOppDetails
fields.fieldText: Review opportunity details and amend as needed to clone the opportunity.

fields.name: Holding
fields.helpText: Enter the Holdings number available at the time this opportunity is created.

fields.name: Number_of_Drivers
fields.helpText: Enter the number of drivers that this opportunity is for.

fields.name: No_of_E_Scooter_E_Bikes
fields.fieldText: No of E Scooter & E Bikes

fields.name: Total_Fleet_Size
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size').

fields.name: Total_SMR_jobs_per_year
fields.helpText: Enter the SMR jobs that this opportunity relates to (This can be different to the total Account volume).

fields.name: Total_Fleet_SizeAAX
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size')

fields.name: Price_Review_TypeClone
fields.helpText: Enter the date the first price review occurs for this contract

fields.name: Price_Review_DateClone
fields.helpText: Enter the date the first price review occurs for this contract

fields.name: Contract_CategoryClone
fields.helpText: Enter the agreement type for this record to identify what happens 6 months prior to the expiry date.

fields.name: Contract_TypeClone
fields.helpText: Enter whether this is a main contract that requires approval or a non contractual amendment

fields.name: Agreement_TypeClone
fields.helpText: Enter the type of agreement for this contract

fields.name: Non_Standard_ClausesClone
fields.helpText: Enter whether there is a Non Standard Clause in the Agreement

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Holding
fields.helpText: Enter the Holdings number available at the time this opportunity is created.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Number_of_Drivers
fields.helpText: Enter the number of drivers that this opportunity is for.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_No_of_E_Scooter_E_Bikes
fields.fieldText: No of E Scooter & E Bikes

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Total_Fleet_Size
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size').

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Total_SMR_jobs_per_year
fields.helpText: Enter the SMR jobs that this opportunity relates to (This can be different to the total Account volume).

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Total_Fleet_SizeAAX
fields.helpText: Enter the fleet size that is applicable for this opportunity (it may be different to the Account 'Total Fleet Size')
